Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Compacted Backpack

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 5 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Akedar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live

Page Updated:Fri Oct 10th, 2025

Expansion: Dragons of Norrath
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1

The Plane of Knowledge
Quest Name

I'm just finding out that we, as Trolls, need to do a lot of traveling to get the items we need to do these quests. Nothing is available in Grobb, and only a couple of items are in PoK. Gonna have to go to Abysmal Sea for the other items.

▲ Page top
Molds
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2005 at 5:07 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
56 posts
Here is how U made the molds.

Ancestrial Armor Book (Return on success or failure)
High Quility Firing Sheet
Hugh Block of Clay
Campact Backpack
Sculpting Tools (Return on Seccess or Failure)

Now, find a KILN (Pottery Oven) and combine all 5 items. U will get a backpack (8 slot filled molds).

Hukimek
Drinal
Knights Reborn

▲ Page top
RE: Molds
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2005 at 2:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362716793
66 posts
What you have listed is not the only way to make the armor the post that you disagree on is one type and your post is another type. There are both tailoring and smithing types of armor.
▲ Page top
Made this
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2005 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
56 posts
Go to Shal Vahl and get these items from Jala.

Large Bottle of Ink (65 to 70 p each)
Roll of Vellum (for dwarves)
A Quill (Returned on sucess or failure)
Book Binding (need an empty slot)
Compact Backpack

Open the Book binding and place all other items in-side. Combine and you will get a 8 slot Backpack filled with patterns for DoN armor.

Still working on the items needed for the armor.

Hukimek
Drinal
Knights Reborn
▲ Page top
RE: Made this
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2005 at 11:25 AM Rating: Default

Scholar
56 posts

Duh!
He said:8 slot Backpack filled with patterns for DoN armor
While it may be leather, its still a type of armor.
No pattern no armor.
No Mold, no armor.
